LAST_DONE:    Executed §210 Item 8 per prior STATE.md NEXT block in a
              single session — V32 §1 Tier 2 decomposition (2-dispatch

              Dispatch sequence:

                Dispatch 1 (Sonnet, ~244L net add — 6dd11a6):
                  - apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/platform.ts (M, +125L)
                    Added imports: bcrypt from "bcryptjs", BCRYPT_ROUNDS=12,
                    languageSchema enum. New platform.createTenantWithAdmin
                    procedure appended just before final `});`:
                      Input: {tenant: {name, slug, timezone, currency},
                             admin: {email, fullName, password (min 12),
                                     languagePreference}}
                      Pre-flight CONFLICT checks on tenant.slug + user.email
                      uniqueness (both BEFORE entering transaction).
                      bcrypt.hash(password, 12) computed BEFORE $transaction
                      (rollback-safe — hash never enters DB on failure).
                      platformPrisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
                        tx.tenant.create({ ... isActive: true })
                        tx.user.create({ role: "site_admin",
                                         tenantId: tenant.id,
                                         passwordHash, isActive: true })
                        await writeAuditLog(tx, PLATFORM:CREATE_TENANT)
                        await writeAuditLog(tx, PLATFORM:CREATE_USER)
                        return { tenant, user }
                      })
                      writeAuditLog accepted tx (Prisma.TransactionClient)
                      without cast — signature permissive enough.
                      role hardcoded to "site_admin" server-side
                      (not user-selectable from input).
                  - apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/__tests__/platform.test.ts
                    (M, +119L) Extended vi.mock platformPrisma block to
                    add user.create, user.findFirst, $transaction. 4 new
                    cases under platform.createTenantWithAdmin describe:
                      * creates tenant + site_admin user atomically + writes
                        both audit logs ($transaction.mockImplementation
                        passes platformPrisma to the callback so mocked
                        tx.tenant.create / tx.user.create resolve)
                      * throws CONFLICT when tenant slug exists (no user,
                        no $transaction)
                      * throws CONFLICT when admin email exists (no tenant,
                        no $transaction)
                      * rejects password <12 chars (Zod validation)
                  Verification: ✅ typecheck 0 errors, 25/25 platform.test
                  pass (21 baseline + 4 new), full web suite 693→697.

                Dispatch 2 (Sonnet, ~309L net add — 75d98c3):
                  - apps/web/src/app/admin/tenants/create-tenant-dialog.tsx
                    (M, 135L → 272L, +137 net) Full rewrite:
                      Added shadcn Select import for languagePreference.
                      Added 5 new useState: showAdminSection, adminEmail,
                      adminFullName, adminPassword, adminLanguage<"en"|"id"|"ms">.
                      Two mutations: createTenant (existing platform.create)
                      + createTenantWithAdmin (new). Both onSuccess invalidate
                      platform.list + platform.metrics + platformUser.list
                      (NEW invalidation — new admin appears in /admin/users
                      immediately).
                      adminFieldsTouched = any of email/name/password non-empty.
                      wantsAdmin = showAdminSection && adminFieldsTouched.
                      handleSubmit branches: wantsAdmin → createTenantWithAdmin
                      with combined payload; else → createTenant (today's
                      tenant-only behaviour fully preserved).
                      Inline validation: partial fill blocks + shows
                      "All initial admin fields are required when the admin
                      section is filled." Password <12 blocks + shows
                      "Initial admin password must be at least 12 characters."
                      JSX: collapsible section uses plain <button> toggle
                      + conditional render (shadcn Collapsible NOT installed
                      — STATE.md fallback honored). aria-expanded +
                      aria-controls on toggle. 4 admin Inputs: email, fullName,
                      password (type=password, minLength=12), Select for language.
                      Submit button label: "Create Tenant" → "Create Tenant
                      + Admin" when wantsAdmin. isPending = either mutation.
                      handleClose resets ALL fields including admin section.
                  - apps/web/src/app/admin/tenants/__tests__/create-tenant-dialog.test.tsx
                    (NEW, +163L) NEW test file because admin-tenants-client.test
                    fully stubs CreateTenantDialog as <div data-testid /> and
                    cannot reach the dialog UI. 8 cases:
                      * trigger renders
                      * admin section collapsed by default (no admin fields)
                      * toggle reveals fields
                      * empty admin section → routes to platform.create
                      * opened-but-empty section → routes to platform.create
                      * filled valid section → routes to createTenantWithAdmin
                        with combined payload
                      * partial fill shows inline error
                      * password <12 shows inline error
                      Test pattern: stubs object holds two vi.fn mutations,
                      trpc mock returns mutate that delegates. userEvent.setup
                      pattern from admin-users-client.test mirrored.
                  Verification: ✅ typecheck 0 errors, 8/8 dialog tests pass,
                  full web suite 697→705 (+8). admin-tenants dir 19 tests pass
                  (11 admin-tenants-client + 8 new dialog). No regression in
                  admin-tenants-client.test — dialog stub still works because
                  test mock interface didn't change.
